PART XXII
SHORT TITLE

395. Short title.—This Constitution may be called the Constitution of India.

SEVENTH SCHEDULE-
(Articles 246 and 248)

List I - Union List.
1. Defence of India.
2. Naval, military and air forces.

List II- State List.
1. Public order.

EIGHTH SCHEDULELanguages.
1. Assamese.
2. Bengali.

NINTH SCHEDULE
-Validation of certain Acts and Regulations.
1. The Bihar Land Reforms Act, 1950.

TENTH SCHEDULE - Provisions as to disqualification on ground of defection.
1. Interpretation.

ELEVENTH SCHEDULE -Powers, authority and responsibilities of Panchayats.
1. Agriculture.

TWELFTH SCHEDULE -Powers, authority and responsibilities of Municipalities.
1. Urban planning.
